title: IIT Roorkee Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee has released the official notification for 1 Senior Research Fellow (SRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Uttarakhand. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./ M.Tech./ M.S. and B.E./B.Tech in Geospatial Engineering / Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Computer Science/Data Science/ Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or related disciplines with CGPA above 6.5 (on 10.0 scale) or percentage greater than 65% aggregate irrespective of category, At least 2 years of post-Master's degree research/teaching experience as evidenced by publications in standard refereed journals
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): M.E./ M.Tech./ M.S. and B.E./B.Tech in Geospatial Engineering / Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Computer Science/Data Science/ Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or related disciplines with CGPA above 6.5 (on 10.0 scale) or percentage greater than 65% aggregate irrespective of category. Having at least 2 years of post-Master's degree research/teaching experience, as evidenced by publications in standard refereed journals.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Roorkee to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Senior Research Fellow (SRF) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Roorkee Senior Research Fellow (SRF) positions is 05 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) post at the Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the SRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have M.E./ M.Tech./ M.S. and B.E./B.Tech in specific engineering disciplines with a minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 65% aggregate, along with at least 2 years of post-Master's research/teaching experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 42000 Per Month, plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the IIT Roorkee SRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Online Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIT Roorkee offer contract positions?
faq.answer: Yes, the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) position is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section provided in this article.
